faq.contactPrompt: Didn't find what you're looking for?
faq.q1: Do I need to know how to write to use the platform?
faq.a1: No. You don't write a single word. Just describe your idea — topic, audience, style — and our AI creates the complete book for you. It's like having a professional ghostwriter available 24/7.
faq.q2: How long until my book is ready?
faq.a2: Less than 1 hour. From zero to a complete book with 30,000+ words, structured and reviewed. If you want a custom cover and translation, add 10–15 more minutes.
faq.a3: Yes. You are the author and full owner of the generated content. Best Sellers AI claims no rights over your book. You can publish, sell, and distribute as you wish.
faq.a4: With one-time purchases, your credits never expire. With subscriptions: Autor Aspirante (credits expire every month), Autor Profissional (credits accumulate for 1 month), and Autor BestSeller (credits accumulate for 3 months).
faq.q5: Can I cancel at any time?
faq.a5: Yes. No penalty, no questions asked. You can cancel your subscription at any time from your dashboard, with immediate effect.
faq.q6: Can I use the generated content commercially?
faq.a6: Starting from the Autor Profissional plan, you have a full commercial use license — you can publish, sell, and use the content in your business.
faq.q7: Does the platform work in other languages?
faq.a7: Yes. We support creation and translation in 30+ languages, including Portuguese, Spanish, English, French, German, and many more.
faq.q8: Is my book cover truly unique?
faq.a8: Yes. We generate 6 exclusive cover variations for your book using state-of-the-art image generation models. Each cover is created specifically for your title.
faq.q9: Is Amazon publishing included in the plans?
faq.a9: Publishing is a specialized service charged separately in credits. With the Standard plan (700 credits), our team handles everything: professional formatting, Amazon KDP publishing, ISBN, and cataloging. The BestSeller plan (1,000 credits) goes further: distribution also on Kobo and Draft2Digital, premium formatting, SEO optimization, and priority support.
faq.q10: Can I create and preview my book for free?
faq.a10: Yes. You can create your project and preview your book for free, without a credit card. To generate and download the final version, you'll need credits.

footerCta.subtitle: Create previews of your book for free and only pay when you're ready to move forward. Just you, your idea, and the most advanced AI in the publishing market.

footer.brandDesc: The AI platform to create, customize, and publish professional books.

chat.welcome1: Hi! I'm Alex from Best Sellers AI, nice to meet you!
chat.welcome2: Can I show you a brand new way to earn GREAT MONEY selling e-books on Amazon, something you might not have known before arriving here?
chat.pitchVideos1: {name}, look at this AVALANCHE of videos being published on YouTube
chat.pitchVideos2: Teaching how to earn GREAT MONEY selling ebooks on Amazon, Google Play Books, and Apple Books...
chat.pitchVideos4: Did you know you could earn this much money selling ebooks on Amazon?
chat.pitchDifficulty2: Why is earning money this way so little known?
chat.pitchDifficulty3: What do you think is the biggest difficulty in trying to earn money selling e-books?
chat.pitchDifficulty4: Did you come to any answer?
chat.pitchSolution1: The biggest difficulty, without a doubt, is WRITING THE E-BOOKS
chat.pitchSolution2: You need to spend weeks, months, or even YEARS, in some cases, to write a quality book and put it up for sale
chat.pitchSolution3: And even with Artificial Intelligence, platforms can identify if your ebook was written by AI or by a human
chat.pitchSolution4: And if they find out it was written by AI, they can even block your account...
chat.pitchSolution6: because we've created a unique AI, trained to write with 100% human language, PERFECTLY IMITATING THE STYLE OF A HUMAN WRITER.
chat.pitchSolution7: And you can publish DOZENS of books per week, if you want... without blocks and without suspicion.
chat.pitchCompare1: Look at the result when you try to create a book using just a generic GPT:
chat.pitchCompare2: Do you understand that just asking GPT to create a book for you DOESN'T WORK?
chat.pitchCompare3: Now, take a look at a text written by our AI, highly trained to sound natural and human:
chat.pitchCompare4: It's exactly what you need to sell e-books on platforms without headaches...
chat.pitchCta: Do you want to generate your book now and start earning money by selling it on the platforms?
chat.letsStart: Excellent, let's get started right now!
chat.bookIntro: I'M GOING TO WRITE A COMPLETE BOOK FOR YOU, FROM SCRATCH, WITH 100% COPYRIGHT, IN LESS THAN 1 HOUR!
chat.bookDetail1: That's right! In less than one hour, you'll have in your hands a digital book of approximately 150 pages...
chat.bookDetail3: Following exactly everything you want it to contain...
chat.bookDetail4: And the best part: you'll have 100% of the copyright to do whatever you want!
chat.choosePathIntro: Now, so I can start planning your book, tell me:
chat.choosePathPrompt: Do you want my help to generate ideas from your topic or do you already have everything ready?
chat.choiceHaveTitle: I ALREADY HAVE MY TITLE AND SUBTITLE
chat.collectTopicPrompt: Alright, just tell me about what topic you'd like to have a 100% yours book... It can be anything, any theme, any subject... (the more info you give, the better!)
chat.collectTitlePrompt: Great! What is the title of your book?
chat.collectSubtitlePrompt: What subtitle do you have in mind?
chat.collectBriefingCustomPrompt: A brief summary of what you want the book's content to be about:
chat.collectAuthorPrompt: Please tell me the author's name:
chat.collectEmailPrompt: What email address would you like to receive the book at?
chat.accountCreated: Account created! Now let me set up your book...
chat.creatingBook: Creating your book and generating the preview...
chat.generatingPreview: Our AI is planning your book right now. This takes about 1-2 minutes...
chat.emailExists: It looks like this email is already registered. Log in to your account to create your book.

adminProducts.paidUsdDesc: Subscriptions and credit packs — users pay real money via Stripe Checkout

adminProducts.subsHintDesc: Each plan has two prices (Monthly and Annual). Users pay via Stripe and receive monthly credits on each billing cycle. Credits may expire based on the plan's accumulation setting.
adminProducts.subsHintMetadata: Plan features (credits/month, books/month, free regens, commercial license, queue priority, etc.) are stored in the product Metadata. Click the pencil icon to edit.
adminProducts.subsHintPriceWarning: Stripe prices are immutable. To change a price, add a new one and deactivate the old one.
adminProducts.packsHintDesc: One-time purchases via Stripe. Users pay in USD and receive credits in their wallet. Purchased credits never expire.
adminProducts.costsHintDesc: Define how many credits each operation costs. Book generation and all addons are paid exclusively with credits — never with money directly.
adminProducts.noCreditsCostConfig: CREDITS_COST configuration not found. Run the database seed.
adminProducts.creditsCostFormDesc: Adjust how many credits each action costs. Changes apply to all new operations.
adminProducts.settingsHintDesc: Free tier limits and addon bundles. Changes take effect immediately (cache refreshes within 5 minutes).
adminProducts.settingsHintWarning: Be careful editing JSON — invalid values may break the app for all users.
adminProducts.freeTierDesc: Limits for free users (no subscription): preview quota, credit limits, feature access.
adminProducts.bundlesDesc: Addon bundles with discounts shown in the Author Journey. Each bundle groups addons at a reduced credit cost.
adminProducts.nameReadOnlyHint: Plan name is defined in code and synced to Stripe.
adminProducts.amountHint: Amount in USD. Will be converted to cents automatically.
adminProducts.creditsGrantedHint: Credits granted to user on purchase/renewal (for subs = monthly credits)

faq.title: Got Questions?
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before publishing

0.question: Who receives the royalties from my book?
0.answer: You, directly to your bank account. We only handle the setup and give you full access to your publishing accounts. 100% of royalties are yours.

1.question: Do you keep any rights to my book?
1.answer: Absolutely not. All copyrights and royalties are 100% yours, forever. Our role is purely technical — we handle the publishing process so you don't have to.

2.question: What do I need to get started?
2.answer: Your final manuscript and a custom cover. That's it. We handle formatting, metadata, ISBN, pricing strategy, and the entire upload process.

3.question: How long until my book is available on Amazon?
3.answer: Typically between 3 and 10 days after we upload it. Some books go live in under 48 hours. You'll be notified the moment it's available.

4.question: Can I make changes after publishing?
4.answer: Yes! You can modify the manuscript, cover, or price anytime from your KDP account at no additional cost. We'll show you how.

5.question: What if I'm not satisfied with the service?
5.answer: Our commitment is to deliver exactly what your plan includes. If there's any error on our part — a formatting issue, a wrong detail — we fix it immediately at no extra cost.

6.question: Can I request a refund?
6.answer: Yes. We offer a 7-day money-back guarantee from the date of purchase. If the service hasn't started yet, we process a full refund — no questions asked.

7.question: What if Amazon rejects my book?
7.answer: That's exactly why you need us. We handle all technical requirements so rejections don't happen. In the rare case it does, we fix it and resubmit until it's approved — at no extra cost.

guarantee.title: 100% Satisfaction Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not completely satisfied with the publication of your book, we'll refund your money. No questions asked, no fine print, no hassle. Your success is our reputation.

cta.text: Your readers are waiting. Don't make them wait any longer.
